user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Fourth Coffee.

input_artifacts.content:
From: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-17 11:53 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Fourth Coffee QBR preparation

Just checking in on the QBR preparation proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
Date: 2024-02-12 08:12 EST
Subject: URGENT: QBR preparation Issue at Fourth Coffee

Just checking in on the QBR preparation proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-23 16:41 EST
Subject: Re: Re: QBR preparation Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about QBR preparation. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: QBR preparation Discussion - Fourth Coffee
Date: 2024-01-26
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: David Rivera (Fourth Coffee), Raj Mehta (Microsoft), David (Fourth Coffee)

[00:01:30] David Rivera (Fourth Coffee): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into QBR preparation.

[00:08:00] David Rivera (Fourth Coffee): On the QBR preparation front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

[00:10:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the QBR preparation front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.

[00:13:00] David Rivera (Fourth Coffee): The timeline for technical validation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:17:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:22:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on cost optimization and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:24:00] David (Fourth Coffee): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:29:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:32:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for technical validation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence
